title: Raccoon Removal in New Brighton, Staten Island | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in New Brighton, Staten Island. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: New Brighton residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of historic Victorian homes and proximity to Staten Island's waterfront parks. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your property from these intelligent and destructive wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal throughout New Brighton, from the residential streets near St. George to the family homes along the Kill Van Kull shoreline.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in raccoon removal for New Brighton's diverse housing stock, including century-old homes with accessible attics and crawl spaces. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, provide complete exclusion services, and offer warranties on all raccoon removal work to ensure your New Brighton property stays raccoon-free.
localContext: New Brighton's tree-lined streets and older architectural features create ideal entry points for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and under porches. The neighborhood's proximity to parks like St. George Playground and the waterfront attracts raccoons searching for food and nesting sites in residential areas.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in New Brighton typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in New Brighton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: New Brighton's combination of older Victorian homes with accessible attics, mature trees, and proximity to waterfront areas creates ideal raccoon habitat. The neighborhood's quiet residential streets and nearby parks provide raccoons with abundant food sources and safe nesting locations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my New Brighton home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in New Brighton for urgent raccoon situations. Most raccoon removals are completed within 3-7 days, though the timeline depends on the number of animals, whether babies are present, and the complexity of exclusion work needed.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in New Brighton homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete raccoon damage restoration including insulation replacement, wood repair, sanitization, and odor removal. Our team also seals all entry points to prevent future raccoon intrusions, which is especially important in New Brighton's older homes with multiple potential access areas.
